channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th April
item.description:
Fw abrupt level Tree root across fw Stats required Needs ramping over 2000x500mm Fw closure (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure 28 day please lift and relay x1 raised 900x600x20mm slab (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 15th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please relay x1 raised rocking 300x200x20mm slab number 1 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure 28 day please lift and relay x1 raised 600x600x22mm slab (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 15th April
item.description:
Give and take plus temporary footway closure please relay x1 raised 900x600x20mm slab number 1 (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Upholstered chair dumped by traffic lights on crossroads Hyde Lane& Evesham Road, 15th April
item.description:
Been there at least a week
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evesham Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:
Cway pothole 640mmx240mmx41mm Road closure TM required 4nsd (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th April
item.description:
Fway abrupt level Stat plan required Tarmac patch 11800mmx370mmx35mm Standard TM required with fway closure (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking on single yellow lines, 15th April
item.description:
Outside Travis Perkins Mead Rd and the in front of the houses opposite and HGVs reversing dangerously because they can’t access Travis Perkins yard .

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:
Cway pothole 450mmx450mmx55mm Road closure TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:
Cway pothole 430mmx440mmx45mm Road closure TM required 1nsd (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 15th April
item.description:
3 way stop and go 28 day carriage pothole 1300x400x50mm size is approx number 1 stats required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 15th April
item.description:
Fway abrupt level Please feather out Stat plan required 1160x20mm Standard TM required with fway closure (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 15th April
item.description:
2 way stop and go 28 day please lift and relay x2 rocking gully frame stats required 900x450x50mm (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.description:
